nodes.label: Render Contract
nodes.note: Defines versioned schema for render artifacts including metadata, seed, params, and deterministic output

nodes.label: Analysis IR (Intermediate Representation)
nodes.note: Musical direction signals extracted from audio analysis including beat phase, bar phase, sections, energy curves

nodes.label: Layer Library
nodes.note: Registry of reusable visual layers with deterministic seeded execution and blend operations

nodes.label: Modulation System
nodes.note: System for binding audio and procedural sources to layer parameters via mapping operations

nodes.label: Preset Schema
nodes.note: Versioned preset format composing layers, palettes, blends, and modulator bindings

nodes.label: Timeline Director
nodes.note: System for arranging scenes across song sections with intensity automation

nodes.label: Transition System
nodes.note: Defines transition types (hard cut, crossfade, beat flash) aligned to musical boundaries

nodes.label: Fixture Mapping & Export
nodes.note: Maps canvas pixels to physical fixtures with gamma correction and brightness limiting

nodes.label: Render Diagnostics
nodes.note: Metrics for brightness, color, variety, and regression detection with contact sheets

nodes.label: Preview Console
nodes.note: Frontend UI for generation, tuning, inspection, and approval workflows

nodes.label: Wave Layer
nodes.note: Sine wave or traveling wave layer responding to beat timing and FFT bands

nodes.label: Radial Pulse Layer
nodes.note: Expanding pulse from origin responding to beats

nodes.label: Solid Field Layer
nodes.note: Solid color fill layer

nodes.label: Gradient Field Layer
nodes.note: Gradient-based fill layer

nodes.label: Bars Layer
nodes.note: Horizontal or vertical bar patterns

nodes.label: Rings Layer
nodes.note: Concentric ring or expanding pulse patterns

nodes.label: Beat Flash Layer
nodes.note: Flash effect triggered on beats

nodes.label: Scanner Layer
nodes.note: Scanning or sweep line effect

nodes.label: Raindrops Shader
nodes.note: POI-aware radial pulses spawning from, transiting through, or colliding at POIs

nodes.label: Spectroid Chase Shader
nodes.note: Note/chord-reactive chase lines expanding from parcan anchors toward moving heads

nodes.label: Canvas (100x50)
nodes.note: Fixed 100x50 pixel output grid as creative constraint and product definition

nodes.label: Point of Interest (POI)
nodes.note: Defined physical and canvas coordinate acting as gravity well, collision target, calibration anchor

nodes.label: Fixture
nodes.note: Physical lighting hardware with DMX addressing and calibration data

nodes.label: Preset
nodes.note: Named composition of layers, palettes, blends, and modulator bindings

nodes.label: Scene
nodes.note: Temporal region in a song with preset, params, seed, and intensity

nodes.label: Transition
nodes.note: Visual bridge between scenes (crossfade, wipe, hard cut, beat cut)

nodes.label: Look
nodes.note: Visible result of a preset or scene, nameable and recognizable

nodes.label: Parameter
nodes.note: Typed preset or layer control with defaults, bounds, step size, and UI grouping

nodes.label: Blend Mode
nodes.note: Layer composition operation (max, add, alpha, multiply, screen, difference, mask)

nodes.label: Modulator
nodes.note: Source binding layer parameters to audio or procedural signals

nodes.label: Render Artifact
nodes.note: Generated output stored in data/artifacts (analysis cache, binary frames, DMX export)

nodes.label: Moving Head
nodes.note: Controllable directional fixture with Pan/Tilt DMX targeting via calibration

nodes.label: Mini Beam Prism
nodes.note: Specific moving head type deployed in left and right positions

nodes.label: Head EL-150
nodes.note: Specific moving head type for center positioning

nodes.label: ParCan (RGB)
nodes.note: Static RGB wash fixture used as chase origin anchors

nodes.label: Head EL-150 Instance
nodes.note: Physical fixture instance at channel 1

nodes.label: Mini Beam Prism (L) Instance
nodes.note: Physical fixture instance at channel 42

nodes.label: Mini Beam Prism (R) Instance
nodes.note: Physical fixture instance at channel 54

nodes.label: ParCan L Instance
nodes.note: Physical fixture instance at channel 16

nodes.label: ParCan R Instance
nodes.note: Physical fixture instance at channel 22

nodes.label: Calibration Reference (ref_0_0_0)
nodes.note: Physical origin [0,0,0] used for moving head Pan/Tilt calibration baseline

nodes.label: Server POI
nodes.note: Room POI at relative location (0.06, 0.08, 0)

nodes.label: TV POI
nodes.note: Room POI at relative location (0.22, 0.01, 0)

nodes.label: Mic POI
nodes.note: Room POI at relative location (0.39, 0.08, 0)

nodes.label: Beat Phase
nodes.note: Normalized phase within beat cycle for temporal alignment

nodes.label: Bar Phase
nodes.note: Normalized phase within bar cycle for meter-aware effects

nodes.label: Smoothed Band Envelope
nodes.note: Per-frequency-band smoothed envelope for reactive effects

nodes.label: Global Energy
nodes.note: Normalized global energy curve across song

nodes.label: Section Labels
nodes.note: Detected downbeat, phrase, and section boundaries with confidence

nodes.label: Onset
nodes.note: Detected transient or note onset event

nodes.label: Audio Modulator: Band Envelope
nodes.note: Binds frequency band envelope to layer parameters

nodes.label: Audio Modulator: Onset
nodes.note: Triggers on detected note onsets

nodes.label: Audio Modulator: Beat Pulse
nodes.note: Triggers on beat boundaries

nodes.label: Audio Modulator: Beat Phase
nodes.note: Continuous phase within beat cycle

nodes.label: Audio Modulator: Bar Phase
nodes.note: Continuous phase within bar cycle

nodes.label: Audio Modulator: Phrase Progress
nodes.note: Progress through detected phrase

nodes.label: Procedural Modulator: LFO
nodes.note: Low-frequency oscillator for continuous variation

nodes.label: Procedural Modulator: Seeded Random
nodes.note: Deterministic randomness based on seed

nodes.label: Mapping Operation: Scale
nodes.note: Scale modulator value by factor

nodes.label: Mapping Operation: Clamp
nodes.note: Restrict modulator value to bounds

nodes.label: Mapping Operation: Invert
nodes.note: Invert modulator polarity

nodes.label: Mapping Operation: Curve
nodes.note: Apply non-linear curve to modulator

nodes.label: Mapping Operation: Smooth
nodes.note: Smooth modulator transitions

nodes.label: Mapping Operation: Lag
nodes.note: Delay modulator response

nodes.label: Mapping Operation: Quantize
nodes.note: Quantize modulator to discrete steps

nodes.label: Phase 1: Baseline And Contracts
nodes.note: Stabilize render contract, cache format, parameter behavior, preview expectations

nodes.label: Phase 2: Musical Analysis IR
nodes.note: Expand audio analysis into show-ready musical signals

nodes.label: Phase 3: Preset And Layer Engine
nodes.note: Replace hardcoded shaders with composable presets, layers, modulators

nodes.label: Phase 4: Timeline And Direction
nodes.note: Arrange visuals by song sections with transitions and intensity curves

nodes.label: Phase 5: Production Console
nodes.note: Upgrade frontend to generation, tuning, inspection, and approval console

nodes.label: Phase 6: Quality, Performance, And Packaging
nodes.note: Add validation, regression checks, diagnostics, cache management, deployment

nodes.label: Epic 01: Render Contract
nodes.note: Backend, Frontend, and Validation tracks for artifact schema versioning

nodes.label: Epic 02: Preview Console
nodes.note: Full frontend UI for generation, progression, inspection, approval workflows

nodes.label: Epic 03: Analysis IR
nodes.note: Musical analysis backend expanding beat/bar/section/energy/envelope signals

nodes.label: Epic 04: Layer Library
nodes.note: Registry of reusable layers with transforms and blend operations

nodes.label: Epic 05: Modulation System
nodes.note: Audio and procedural modulator sources with mapping operations

nodes.label: Epic 06: Preset Schema
nodes.note: Preset format composing layers, palettes, blends, parameters; undersea_waves and undersea_pulse_01 presets

nodes.label: Epic 07: Raindrops Shader
nodes.note: POI-aware raindrop pulses with start, transit, and collision behaviors

nodes.label: Epic 08: Spectroid Chase Shader
nodes.note: Parcan-anchored chase lines expanding toward moving heads

nodes.label: Epic 09: Timeline Director
nodes.note: Multi-scene timeline with auto-generation from sections and parameter automation

nodes.label: Epic 10: Transition System
nodes.note: Transition types aligned to beat/bar/phrase/section boundaries

nodes.label: Epic 11: Fixture Mapping And Export
nodes.note: Physical fixture mapping with linear/serpentine ordering, gamma, brightness limiting

nodes.label: Epic 12: Render Diagnostics
nodes.note: Diagnostics metrics, variety signals, contact sheets, regression detection

nodes.label: Undersea Waves Preset
nodes.note: 3 layered sine waves responding to beat and FFT bands, configurable base color

nodes.label: Undersea Pulse 01 Preset
nodes.note: Current baseline wave and pulse look migrated to preset format

nodes.label: Hard Cut Transition
nodes.note: Immediate scene change

nodes.label: Crossfade Transition
nodes.note: Alpha blend between scenes over duration

nodes.label: Beat Flash Cut Transition
nodes.note: Flash cut synchronized to beat
